g.text: HTTP 400 {error: "Password too weak. Must contain at least 8 characters, numbers, and symbols."}
update account settings where userId = ? [TLS, encrypted at rest]
return 200 {message: "Verification link expired or invalid. Old email unchanged."}
HTTP 200 {confirmationDialog: true, message: "Are you sure? This action is irreversible."}
[user cancels (no second request or invalid token)]
HTTP 200 {message: "Account deletion cancelled. Return to settings."}
Delete all Posts owned by user, AccountSettings, User record
delete posts where userId = ?; delete account settings where userId = ? [TLS]
